name: staffa
description: An opinionated component library for the Aberdeen reactive UI library.

scripts.build: npm run build:icons && tsc && tsc -p demo && esbuild src/index.ts --bundle --external:aberdeen --minify --format=esm --outfile=dist/staffa.esm.js
scripts.build:skill: rm -rf skill ; mkdir skill && readme-tsdoc --create src/index.ts --file skill/REFERENCE.md --split && awk '/^@@include /{while((getline line < $2)>0) print line; close($2); next} 1' skill-template.md > skill/SKILL.md && rm skill/REFERENCE.md
scripts.prepublish: npm run build && shotest test && npm run build:skill
